Core Concepts: uniqueid, dcno, type, city, state, accountnumber, reqshipviaid, clientid, saleschannelid
saleschannelskus: Table: saleschannelskus. Description: Stores product information for each sales channel, including buyer-provided part numbers and entry dates.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, skuid, buyerpartnumber, saleschannelid, entrydate
scthirdpartyaccounts: Table: scthirdpartyaccounts. Description: Stores third-party account information, including client associations, sales channels, and logistics details, for inventory management and order fulfillment purposes.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, clientid, saleschannelid, dcno, type, city, state, accountnumber, entrydate, entryuserid, modifieddate, modifieduserid
sku: Table: sku. Description: Stores product stock information and inventory levels.. Core Concepts: skuid, sku, description, status, weight, reorderpoint, purchasecost, itemtype, maxorderqty, entryuserid, entrydate, modifieduserid, modifieddate, minorderqty, uom, islotcode, isexpdate, isserialno, hsncode, mpncode
skuautofill: Table: skuautofill. Description: Stores SKU auto-fill information and related data for efficient inventory management and order fulfillment processes.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, saleschannelid, channel, activefrom_date, activeto_date, quantity, skuid, entryuserid, entrydate, modifieduserid, modifiedentrydate
skubarcode: Table: skubarcode. Description: Stores inventory item barcodes, associated stock keeping units, and entry/ modification history for warehouse management and order fulfillment purposes.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, packagetype, barcode, skuid, entryuserid, entrydate, modifieduserid, modifieddate
skuchannelmapping: Table: skuchannelmapping. Description: Maps SKUs to clients across various sales channels, enabling inventory management and order fulfillment.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, clientid, isactive, skuid, channelid, entryuserid, entrydate, modifieduserid, modifieddate
skuinventorylocation: Table: skuinventorylocation. Description: Tracks inventory quantities and locations across warehouses, enabling efficient order fulfillment and logistics management.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, skuid, locationid, recqty, availableqty, allocatedqty, entrydate, modifieddate, modifieduserid, recpo, lotcode, palletid, entryuserid, lotexp, pouniqueid, ishold, whid, holdreasonid, rohistoryid
skuinventorylocationlog: Table: skuinventorylocationlog. Description: Tracks inventory movements, including allocations, shipments, receipts, and cancellations, across warehouse locations.. skukitmapping: Table: skukitmapping. Description: Maps kit SKUs to their constituent components, including quantities and assembly details, for inventory management and order fulfillment purposes.. Core Concepts: kitskuid, componentskuid, quantity, iteminclude, uniqueid, entrydate, entryuserid, modifieduserid, modifieddate
skulotcode: Table: skulotcode. Description: Stores product stock codes and related inventory information.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, ponumber, lotcode, lotcodeexpdate, entrydate, quantity, skuid, availqty, penqty, podate, clientid, poqty, pouniqueid, islotcodeactive
skupackage: Table: skupackage. Description: Tracks packaging details, including item quantities, weights, dimensions, and shipping information for warehouse inventory management.. skushippingbox: Table: skushippingbox. Description: Tracks and manages shipping boxes, including inventory, status, and entry history for order fulfillment and logistics operations.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, shippingbox, isactive, entrydate
state: Table: state. Description: Stores state information, including abbreviations, full names, and country affiliations, for geographical and administrative purposes.. Core Concepts: id, state, statename, country
subcategory: Table: subcategory. Description: Stores subcategory information for inventory management and order fulfillment purposes.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, subcategoryname, categoryid, isactive, entryuserid, entrydate, clientid
v_ordersource: Table: v_ordersource. Description: Stores information about the sources of customer orders, including sales channels and marketing campaigns.. Core Concepts: saleschannelid
vendor: Table: vendor. Description: Stores vendor information, including contact details, locations, and client associations for logistics and procurement purposes.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, vendortype, vendorname, address1, address2, city, state, postalcode, country, phone, mobile, email, website, gst, pan, taxid, tags, photo, language, entryuserid
warehouse: Table: warehouse. Description: Stores warehouse locations, addresses, contact information, and operational status for logistics and inventory management purposes.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, whname, isactive, entrydate, entryuserid, address, city, state, postalcode, phone, email, country, contactname, defaultpalletid, defaultlocationid
whclient: Table: whclient. Description: Stores client information and references for warehouse operations and logistics management.. whuserwarehouses: Table: whuserwarehouses. Description: Stores warehouse access permissions, user roles, and access levels for authorized personnel.. Core Concepts: uniqueid, userid, whid, isactive, createddate, createduserid, modifieddate, modifieduserid, accesslevel
